brand_dna.category: Premium men's formalwear rental - suits, tuxedos, morning suits and highland wear for weddings and occasions.
brand_dna.core_belief: Looking sharp shouldn't require a significant investment or the commitment of ownership - just rent it, rock it, return it.
proof_points: Express DPD delivery with a pre-paid return label included in every order
Free size swap if an item doesn't fit, with next-day delivery when notified by 11am weekdays
Try-on service available so customers avoid ordering the wrong size
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before delivery; bookings up to a year in advance
brand_dna.positioning: Premium quality tailoring at rental prices - the polished, hassle-free alternative to buying or bargain hire.

voice_pillars.name: Effortless & Easy
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every step as simple and low-friction, removing the stress from formalwear.
voice_pillars.quote: Rent it. Rock it. Return it. It's that simple.

voice_pillars.name: Quality-Led
voice_pillars.desc: Insists renting never means compromising on tailoring or fabric.
voice_pillars.quote: We don't believe renting a suit should mean sacrificing on quality.

voice_pillars.name: Sartorial & Refined
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks the language of elegance and expert styling to signal a premium look.

voice_pillars.name: Warm & Blokey
voice_pillars.desc: Talks to the customer like a helpful mate with friendly, gender-aware asides.
voice_pillars.quote: Top tip gents! Choose 5 days ahead for free replacements (if needed).

phrases: look and feel your absolute best

icp: Grooms, groomsmen and men attending weddings, black tie events and Royal Ascot who want a premium, well-fitting look without the cost or commitment of buying a suit.

personas.name: The Groom's Party
personas.description: A groom or best man coordinating group formalwear who is moved by group booking discounts, matching looks and reliable delivery for the big day.

personas.name: Last-Minute Attendee
personas.description: A guest needing a sharp suit fast for an upcoming event, moved by express delivery, easy returns and the try-on safety net against sizing errors.

personas.name: The Occasion Dresser
personas.description: A style-conscious man attending Ascot or black tie who wants premium tailoring and expert-paired outfits without owning a rarely-worn suit.

offers: £5 off your first order when you join The Tailor's Club newsletter
Free size swap if an item doesn't fit
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before delivery
Optional damage insurance added at checkout
Pre-paid return label included with every order

allowed.claim: Free size swap if an item doesn't fit
Express DPD delivery with pre-paid return label included
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before delivery
Try-on service available before you commit
Book up to a year in advance
£5 off your first order when you join The Tailor's Club

banned.claim: The best suit hire company in the world / #1 suit hire
banned.why: FTC substantiation - unqualified superlative that cannot be proven.
FTC substantiation - guaranteed-results claim the brand cannot back; their own copy relies on a try-on and swap process.

banned.claim: Rated 5 stars by 10,000+ customers / invented review counts
banned.why: FTC - no review counts or aggregate ratings appear in the input; inventing them is prohibited.

banned.claim: Only 2 left - book in the next hour or miss out
banned.why: FTC - fake or invented urgency not supported by real stock data.

banned.claim: Everyone gets their order next day, guaranteed
banned.why: FTC - overstates a conditional service; swaps are next-day only if notified by 11am weekdays.

banned.claim: Customers say it's the highest quality tuxedo on the market
banned.why: FTC - testimonials must reflect typical results and no such quote exists in the input.
